ques: Find the lowest fare from all eligible one-way flights for 1 adult from JFK to Heathrow on Jun. 22.
answer: The lowest one-way fare for 1 adult from JFK to London Heathrow (LHR) is €409 (Iberia, 1 stop via Madrid). Note: Jun. 22 was unavailable — June 22, 2026 is in the past and June 22, 2027 exceeds Google's booking window — so the nearest selectable date, Thu June 25, 2026, was used.
